scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n shared,backend,frontend,go2rtc -c dim,blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @ha/shared" "npm run dev -w @ha/backend" "npm run dev -w @ha/frontend" "npm run dev:go2rtc"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run free-dev-ports && npm run dev -w @ha/backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run free-dev-ports && npm run dev -w @ha/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ha/shared && npm run build -w @ha/backend && npm run build -w @ha/frontend
